sex is for beginners 

underneath sexual lust is the desire for intimacy, expression, aliveness

a tantrika is getting fucked by the universe with every single breath

every sensation and thought is made of sparkling energy

enlightenment is just

- increased right hemisphere integration and decrease in left hemisphere dominance

what's the big deal?

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2023-11-19
artifacts.excerpt:
2) Getting the trade-off right initially feels like tuning a guitar string - not too rigid, not too loose. 

What feels good is having a core structure (e.g. daily practices) but freedom within that structure. 

Ideally, the structure is fractal, so also weekly, monthly, etc.

"Belief" isn't enough. To really perceive differently, you need to change unconscious processes. 

Even if you succeed, you don't want to be stuck with a single view (magical or not). 

Deconstructing views again is key. 

Read more on my latest blog post, link in bio. https://t.co/GBAQL6m0ei
